commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content:
Dibon. Septuagint, read, "Dimon "which signifies, "blood. "I will give it a better claim to this appellation.
Lion. Nabuchodonosor. (Calmet)
Septuagint, "I will bring the Arabs up on Dimon, and will take away the seed of Moab, and Ariel, and the remnant of Adama. "(Haydock)
